messages.content: What is the capital of NZ
The capital of New Zealand is Wellington.
What is considered the best Lord of the Rings trilogy movie

The Lord of the Rings trilogy is widely considered to be one of the greatest film trilogies of all time. Each movie in the trilogy is highly regarded, but "The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King" won 11 Academy Awards, including Best Picture, which makes it often considered the best movie of the trilogy.
